plan_review_notes: Approve the bounded ingress slice: expose a new read-only evolution execution entrypoint over CLI and MCP by calling the existing orchestrator, while keeping persisted-run inspection commands unchanged and excluding follow-up approval, provider execution, and promotion/invalidation mutation.

plan_review_history.notes: Approve the bounded ingress slice: expose a new read-only evolution execution entrypoint over CLI and MCP by calling the existing orchestrator, while keeping persisted-run inspection commands unchanged and excluding follow-up approval, provider execution, and promotion/invalidation mutation.

spec_review_notes: Freeze scope to operator-facing evolution execution ingress only. The implementation may add a shared helper plus CLI/MCP entrypoints that invoke execute_evolution_run and render reviewable results. It must not create follow-up tasks, auto-approve plans/specs, call provider execution for production changes, or mutate live repo/task state beyond append-only run artifacts.

normal_cases.name: CLI and MCP can start a read-only evolution run and return reviewable metadata for the created run.

edge_cases.name: Explicit `target_ids`, `task_ids`, and `max_events` inputs flow through to the orchestrator without widening scope.
Existing `evolution run/status/report/compare` inspection commands remain unchanged for persisted runs.

exception_cases.name: Orchestrator failures surface actionable run and artifact context instead of a generic failure.
Duplicate or invalid run creation input fails without mutating live task state or creating follow-up execution side effects.

verification_methods.target: CLI and MCP can start a read-only evolution run and return reviewable metadata for the created run.
verification_methods.method: env PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 /tmp/sisyphus-venv-fresh/bin/python -m unittest -q tests.test_sisyphus tests.test_mcp_core tests.test_evolution

verification_methods.target: Explicit target_ids, task_ids, and max_events inputs flow through to the orchestrator without widening scope.
Orchestrator failures surface actionable run and artifact context instead of a generic failure.
